title: YTP - Possessed by a terrorist cockroach...
description:
Tennis Round 2 Verses Wheeliedude (bubzy107)

Denise's seizure causes mayhem as Cliff gets possessed by a terrorist cockroach and starts calling himself Santa.

Meanwhile, the Animal Soccer World vultures are on a high again. This time without a huge death star thing to blow the party up... and a party it is now!

And amongst the chaos, the Ghostbusters blow stuff up...

Clips/Audio added from:

Animal Soccer World
The Real Ghostbusters
Dangermouse
Psycho
